heading: Oversight
label: 18117 Oversight
text: The Inspector General of the Department of Health and Human Services shall have oversight authority with respect to the administration and implementation of this title as it relates to such Department.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title I of , , , which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and transferred numerous other sections and notes in the Code. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Tables.Pub. L. 111–148124 Stat. 130Mar. 23, 2010
amendments: References in TextThis title, referred to in text, is title I of , , , which enacted this chapter and enacted, amended, and transferred numerous other sections and notes in the Code.
